label: 7104 Contractor’s right of appeal from decision by contracting officer

children.heading: .—Appeal to Agency Board
children.label: a .—Appeal to Agency Board
children.text: A contractor, within 90 days from the date of receipt of a contracting officer’s decision under , may appeal the decision to an agency board as provided in .section 7103 of this titlesection 7105 of this title

children.heading: Bringing an Action De Novo in Federal Court.—
children.label: b Bringing an Action De Novo in Federal Court.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), and in lieu of appealing the decision of a contracting officer under to an agency board, a contractor may bring an action directly on the claim in the United States Court of Federal Claims, notwithstanding any contract provision, regulation, or rule of law to the contrary.section 7103 of this title

children.heading: .—Tennessee valley authority
children.label: 2 .—Tennessee valley authority
children.text: In the case of an action against the Tennessee Valley Authority, the contractor may only bring an action directly on the claim in a district court of the United States pursuant to , notwithstanding any contract provision, regulation, or rule of law to the contrary.section 1337 of title 28

children.heading: .—Time for filing
children.label: 3 .—Time for filing
children.text: A contractor shall file any action under paragraph (1) or (2) within 12 months from the date of receipt of a contracting officer’s decision under .section 7103 of this title

children.heading: .—De novo
children.label: 4 .—De novo
children.text: An action under paragraph (1) or (2) shall proceed de novo in accordance with the rules of the appropriate court.
